description: Draft quotes existing policy (refund timeline) without committing to an action — should pass scope

inputs.customerMessage: Once I return the sweater, how long until I get my money back?
inputs.draftContent: Hi Sarah, once we receive your returned sweater at our warehouse, your refund will be issued to your original payment method within 5-7 business days.
chunks: Returns are accepted within 30 days of delivery. Once we receive the returned item at our warehouse, refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5-7 business days.
